competitorComparisons: 3 of 5 niche competitors run bundle pricing you may not offer.
Average competitor catalog (~217 items) is larger than yours (~68).
3 competitors run an always-on free shipping threshold.
weaknesses: Estimated Google ranking for your main keyword: page 1 (4-10) — real visibility is likely limited.
Page speed score is 44/100 — slow load times hurt both ranking and conversion.
Only 40% of product images have alt text — a missed, easy SEO win.
Checkout requires account creation before payment.
recommendations: Target page-1 ranking with on-page SEO fixes (title tags, meta descriptions, internal links) before spending more on ads.
Compress product images and lazy-load below-the-fold content to lift page speed.
Add descriptive alt text to product images to improve image-search ranking.
Introduce a starter bundle to match competitor pricing tiers.
Test a free-shipping threshold against current margin.
Add guest checkout to reduce drop-off.
goalRoadmap: Set up a post-purchase email flow — most repeat-customer revenue is lost in the first 30 days of silence.
Introduce a simple loyalty or reorder incentive matched to your pricing tier.
Segment past buyers by product category and target them with relevant restock or complementary offers.
